description:
A security audit requires rotating camera credentials using the Nx Witness REST API (https://localhost:7001). Authenticate using admin/Admin1234! and update the credentials for the following cameras:

- 'Parking Lot Camera' (User: 'cam_admin', Password: 'P@rkL0t2024!Secure')
- 'Entrance Camera' (User: 'cam_operator', Password: 'Entr@nce2024!Secure')
- 'Server Room Camera' (User: 'srv_monitor', Password: 'SrvR00m2024!Secure')

Record each update in a log file at /home/ga/camera_credential_update.log using the format: [ISO_TIMESTAMP] Updated credentials for "CAMERA_NAME" (ID: DEVICE_ID) - username set to: USERNAME
